meaning: n.(旧民间传说中)青须公,残酷的丈夫,乱取妻妾然后将她们杀害的男人
examples: "Will you not come down?" cried Bluebeard.
"Fail not to bring it to me presently," said Bluebeard.
"Come down quickly," cried Bluebeard, "or I will come up to you."
The most notorious pixie was Le Barboue, or Old Bluebeard, said to wheel a barrow of parsnips angrily around the parishes of St Pierre du Bois and Torteval.
So I don't think it was unusual for Bartok to pick a revisionist rendition of a dark and terror-filled fairy tale as the libretto for his first and only opera, Duke Bluebeard's Castle.
